query:
UPDATE lectures 
SET 
  title = 'Choosing the Right Study Design to Achieve the Best Outcome',
  description = 'Join Dr. Abdullah Al Alawi, Founder of MedResearch Academy, for an essential session on selecting the optimal research study design for your clinical questions. Learn how different study designs impact the validity, feasibility, and overall success of your research outcomes.

📚 Learning Objectives:
• Understand the hierarchy of evidence and how study design affects research quality
• Learn to match your research question (PICO framework) to the appropriate study design
• Compare strengths and limitations of observational vs. interventional studies
• Master the selection criteria for case-control, cohort, and cross-sectional designs
• Identify common pitfalls in study design selection and how to avoid them
• Develop a systematic approach to designing feasible and impactful clinical research

👨‍⚕️ Speaker: Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi
Founder, MedResearch Academy | Senior Consultant in General Medicine

⏱️ Duration: 60 minutes (20:00-21:00 Muscat Time)'
WHERE id = 60001;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3gJPMgbNvxobdJv.c80c7479a201 --database kEGM3BVtTzTes7GE5TMbVx --execute UPDATE lectures

  title = 'Choosing the Right Study Design to Achieve the Best Outcome',

👨‍⚕️ Speaker: Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi
